originalTitle: SUMMER GAME FEST 2026: Descriptive Audio Livestream (Live Today)
content: Watch 4K60FPS Feed: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QdNmVWXuYec This is the Descriptive Audio Feed Join Geoff Keighley and Lucy James live from Dolby Theatre in Hollywood for a 2 hour live look at what's next in video games, with new game announcements, surprise special guests and more. Immediately followed by Day of the Devs. Streaming live in 4K 60FPS at 5p ET / 2p PT / 11p CEST. Subscribe to Watch more Summer Game fest: http://bit.ly/tga18sub Follow SGF on X: http://www.x.com/summergamefest Follow Summer Game Fest on Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/summergamefest
chineseContent: 观看 4K60FPS 源：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QdNmVWXuYec 这是描述性音频源 与杰夫·基斯利 (Geoff Keighley) 和露西·詹姆斯 (Lucy James) 一起在好莱坞杜比剧院现场观看 2 小时的视频游戏动态，包括新游戏公告、惊喜特邀嘉宾等。紧接着是开发者日。以 4K 60FPS 在 5p ET / 2p PT / 11p CEST 进行直播。订阅观看更多夏季游戏节：http://bit.ly/tga18sub 在 X 上关注 SGF：http://www.x.com/summergamefest 在 Instagram 上关注夏季游戏节：http://www.instagram.com/summergamefest
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
